item.title: Change Your LUKS Encryption
item.description: Changing the Passphrase: sudo cryptsetup luksChangeKey /dev/sdX LUKs Drives With Multiple Passphrases: LUKS Drives can actually have multiple passphrases or key files associated with them, up to eight. To start, take a look at your drive and see how many keys it has. Chances are, you’ll only see key slot 0 occupied. That’s the first one. sudo cryptsetup luksDump /dev/sdX | grep -i key If you have free slots open, you can always add another passphrase to your drive.
